locator.quote: close open position on runner X at market

text: A dedicated close-open-position-on-runner-X-at-market action; the env sizes the hedge to the floor, the agent only chooses whether and when to close.

locator.quote: Mirrors how a live human scalper actually operates

text: The close-position action mirrors how a live human scalper actually operates — the agent decides to close; the env sizes the hedge.
